title: 1.1: Reports that Alembic migrations create 77 tables in total on an empty PostgreSQL database.
1.2: Identifies the last table created based on migration output order (e.g., user_audit_log or alias_audit_log).
1.3: Reports a Flask server ready message that includes port 7777 (e.g., '* Running on http://127.0.0.1:7777').
1.4: Reports the measured startup time in milliseconds between first log entry and ready message (e.g., 800ms, 2000ms, or any measured value).
1.5: Confirms email handler listens on port 25025 with log messages (e.g., 'Listen for port 25025' and 'Start mail controller 0.0.0.0 25025').
1.6: Reports login failure for unactivated users returns HTTP 422 with JSON error 'Account not activated'.
1.7: Reports activated=False and notification=True for newly created users in the database.
1.8: Reports the max_alias_free_plan value from /api/user_info before changing configuration (e.g., 5).
1.9: Explains that configuration changes affect all users immediately after server restart, not just newly created users.
1.10: Shows curl output with HTTP headers visible (e.g., '< HTTP/1.1 422' or '> Content-Type').
1.11: Reports the /api/user_info JSON response after changing configuration (e.g., max_alias_free_plan: 10).
